analysis: The project has a black hole theme with animated objects and slides. The current UI needs to be enhanced to fully reflect the black hole theme with cosmic animations and interactive elements. Complete the HTML content to ensure all sections are properly included, such as the main content area with interactive planets, animated slides, and other sections related to black holes. Add a mobile-friendly navigation menu with a hamburger icon for better usability on mobile devices.

Complete the JavaScript content to ensure all functions are properly implemented, including the mobile menu toggle functionality with proper event handling, smooth transitions, and user-friendly interactions.
